name: tom-select
when_to_use: 要把 <select> 升级成带搜索/多选/分组/输入新建的下拉(指派用户、分类、筛选)时用它;数据模型是「从列表里挑」用它,是「打自由 chip/@mention」用目录里的 tagify。
why_valuable: 可搜索、多选/tagging、选项分组、输入创建、远程加载、完整键盘/ARIA 的 combobox 是公认难做的组件;手写版常在键盘导航、焦点管理和大列表性能上悄悄崩。

data_in.note: 挂在一个空 <input> 或 <select> 上;options 每项的取值/显示字段名由 valueField/labelField 决定(默认 value/text)。CSS 是独立文件,widget 必须显式链入 shadow。

schema.options: Array<{ value: string, text: string, optgroup?: string }> —— 可选项列表(字段名随 valueField/labelField)
schema.items?: string[] —— 预选中的 value 数组,默认 []
schema.valueField?: string —— option 的值字段,默认 'value'
schema.labelField?: string —— option 的显示字段,默认 'text'
schema.searchField?: string[] —— 参与搜索的字段,默认 ['text']
schema.maxItems?: number | null —— 最多可选数(1=单选,null=多选无限),默认 null
schema.create?: boolean —— 允许输入创建新选项,默认 false
schema.optgroups?: Array<{ value, label }> —— 选项分组(配 option.optgroup)

spec.note: 表单控件:控件高度由内容撑开(≈40px),下拉为浮层叠加;:host 撑高即可,无需也勿设固定像素高,禁 vh。

uplink: 选中项变化由消费 AI 接原生 control.on('change'|'item_add'|'item_remove') 回调外传,本条不预设事件契约。

carriers.widget: conditional:需把 tom-select.css 显式链入 shadowRoot;默认 dropdownParent 使下拉留在 .ts-wrapper 内(勿设为 body)
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + 外链 CSS,无 worker

isolation.evidence: +esm default export TomSelect(grep: '$ as default');构造 new TomSelect(input: string|TomInput, settings: RecursivePartial<TomSettings>) 见 dist/esm/tom-select.d.ts。settings options/optgroups/items/valueField/labelField/searchField/maxItems/maxOptions/create/persist/plugins/placeholder/hideSelected/closeAfterSelect/dropdownParent/controlInput 均真实(dist/esm/types/settings.d.ts)。globalStyleInjection=no:JS 不注入 CSS(+esm grep document.head=0),CSS 是独立文件 dist/css/tom-select.css,本条为 widget 手动链入 shadow。globalDomMutation=no(默认):把传入的 <input>/<select> 原地包成 .ts-wrapper,下拉默认渲染在 .ts-wrapper 内(dropdownParent 默认保持在树内)故留在 shadow——仅 opt-in dropdownParent:'body' 才逃逸。globalEvents=yes:加 document 级 pointerdown/click 关下拉(retarget 安全,destroy() 时移除)。shadowCompatible=conditional:CSS 链入 shadow 且不设 dropdownParent:'body' 即可用。

en.when_to_use: Use it to upgrade a <select> into a searchable, multi-select, grouped, create-by-typing dropdown for assigning users, categorizing, or filtering. Use it when the data model is choosing from a list; for free-form chips/@mentions, use tagify from the catalog.
en.why_valuable: A combobox with search, multi-select/tagging, option groups, input creation, remote loading, and complete keyboard/ARIA behavior is notoriously difficult. Handwritten versions often fail silently at keyboard navigation, focus management, and large-list performance.

data_in.note: Mount on an empty <input> or <select>. valueField/labelField select the value/display field names in each option, defaulting to value/text. CSS is a separate file and the widget must link it explicitly into shadow.

schema.options: Array<{ value: string, text: string, optgroup?: string }> -- Option list (field names follow valueField/labelField)
schema.searchField?: string[] -- Fields included in search; default ['text']
schema.maxItems?: number | null -- Maximum selections (1=single select, null=unlimited multi-select); default null
schema.create?: boolean -- Allow typed creation of new options; default false
schema.optgroups?: Array<{ value, label }> -- Option groups, paired with option.optgroup

spec.note: Form control: content determines the control height (about 40px), and the dropdown is an overlaid floating layer. Let :host grow; no fixed pixel height is needed or desired, and vh is forbidden.
